case_title: HAO DU VS. KINGNAM STEVEN KONG

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) FILED BY DEFENDANT KONG, KINGNAM STEVEN
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-15-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-15-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY MANDARIN INTERPRETER HSIN-JU CHANG. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY DU, HAO AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, KINGNAM STEVEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-19-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-15-2019 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, KINGNAM STEVEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JAN-30-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KONG, KINGNAM STEVEN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-19-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-15-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DU, HAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KONG, KINGNAM STEVEN $2,922.11 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,012.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ADDED TO EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF JUL-01-2019
